title: Insight-Centric Dashboard Specification Schema
description: The contract between Dashboard Composer and Dashboard Renderer, focusing on actionable intelligence rather than BI chart grids.

version.description: Schema version to support future migrations.

title.description: The main title of the generated report.

executive_summary.description: High-level summary for C-level readers. Explains what happened overall and what to do.

sections.description: Logical groupings of insights (e.g., 'Performance Drivers', 'Channel Analysis').

insights.description: The core rendering unit: The Insight Block.

business_impact.description: The 'So What?'. How this affects the business.

decision_signal.description: Action orientation tag (e.g., 'Review Campaign Targeting', 'Scale Budget', 'Monitor Closely').

recommendation.description: Concrete action step for the user.
